product.applications: Wastewater clarification, suspended solids removal, process water conditioning
product.specs: Stable liquor, consistent dosage efficiency, strong clarification performance
product.overview: Coagulants and flocculants are used to destabilize colloids and improve solids separation in water and wastewater systems.
product.technicalNotes: Product choice depends on influent quality, pH, alkalinity, and clarification objective.
product.documentation: CoA, TDS, MSDS available on request
product.datasheet: Recommended for municipal and industrial water treatment plants where reliable clarification is required.
